footer.brand: Egypt's trusted platform for finding and listing properties. Transparent, fast, and reliable.
footer.address: Medical Mall, Abbas El Akkad Street, 9th District, Obour City

about.heroSubtitle: Revolutionizing real estate and rentals in Egypt — connecting tenants with trusted property owners through a seamless digital experience.
about.missionDesc: At Makanak, we believe finding a home should be simple, transparent, and stress-free. Our mission is to bridge the gap between tenants and property owners with a platform built on trust, verified listings, secure payments, and dedicated support — empowering everyone in the Egyptian real estate market.
about.featurePaymentsDesc: All transactions are processed securely through Stripe, ensuring your money is safe at every step of the booking process.
about.featureVerifiedDesc: Every listing is reviewed and verified by our team, so you can book with confidence knowing the property is real and accurate.
about.featureDisputeDesc: Our dedicated dispute resolution team is here to mediate and resolve any issues between tenants and owners quickly and fairly.
about.featureBookingDesc: From search to check-in, our streamlined booking flow makes it easy to find, reserve, and enjoy your perfect property.

legal.agreeToTerms: I agree to the <termsLink>Terms & Conditions</termsLink> and <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>.
legal.mustAgree: You must agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy.
legal.section1P1: "Makanak" is an electronic platform that operates as a "digital intermediary" aimed at facilitating the listing, searching, and booking of properties available for rent within the Arab Republic of Egypt.
legal.section1P2: The platform's role is exclusively limited to connecting the two parties of the service: the Tenant (Client) and the Owner (Host).
legal.section1P3: Makanak disclaims responsibility for the ownership of listed properties; it neither owns nor directly manages these properties, unless explicitly stated otherwise in the unit description.
legal.section2P1: Unit Selection: The tenant browses available properties and selects the suitable unit for the desired period.
legal.section2P2: Booking Confirmation (Deposit): A booking is only considered "confirmed" after the tenant pays the "booking deposit" electronically through the platform's approved payment gateways and receives an official confirmation message.
legal.section2P3: Data Exchange: Once payment is successfully confirmed, the platform automatically shares contact information between both parties (tenant and owner) to facilitate handover and contract completion.
legal.section2P4: Remaining Balance Settlement: The tenant is obligated to pay the remaining agreed-upon rental amount directly to the owner (host) upon inspection and handover of the unit. The platform does not intervene in the collection of this remaining amount.
legal.section3P1: Commission Entitlement: Makanak does not charge any fees for listing or browsing. The platform earns its commission only upon successful completion of a booking.
legal.section3P2: Commission Value: The platform's commission is calculated as the full value of the "booking confirmation deposit" paid electronically by the tenant through the platform.
legal.section3P3: Commission & Cancellations: In case of a cancellation request, the commission (deposit) is subject to the refund rules outlined in "Section 4". The commission is considered the platform's right if the tenant is not eligible for a refund.
legal.section4Intro: This policy has been established to ensure seriousness and protect the time of owners and opportunities of other tenants. The following rules apply when requesting a cancellation:
legal.section4Row1Value: 100% refund of the deposit (only administrative payment gateway fees are deducted, if applicable).
legal.section4Row2Value: 50% refund of the deposit value only.
legal.section4Row3Title: Less than 24 hours before arrival or no-show
legal.section4Row3Value: The tenant is not entitled to any refund. The deposit is considered the right of the platform and owner for reserving and blocking the unit.
legal.section5Intro: The tenant must comply with general codes of conduct and applicable Egyptian laws, in addition to the following:
legal.section5P1: Data Accuracy: Providing accurate and up-to-date personal information during registration or booking. The tenant bears responsibility for any consequences resulting from incorrect data.
legal.section5P2: Occupancy Capacity: Strict compliance with the number of individuals specified in the booking details. The owner has the right to refuse additional individuals or charge extra fees.
legal.section5P3: Property Safety: Maintaining the safety of the property and all its contents including furniture and appliances. The tenant is legally and financially responsible for any damages resulting from negligence or misuse during the stay.
legal.section5P4: Schedule Compliance: Full adherence to the pre-determined check-in and check-out times to avoid booking conflicts and protect other users' rights.
legal.section6Intro: The owner is primarily responsible for the quality of the accommodation experience, and is committed to:
legal.section6P1: Compliance & Quality: Delivering the property on the specified date in the agreed-upon technical and cleanliness condition as shown in the listing photos and description.
legal.section6P2: Price Guarantee: Once the tenant pays the deposit and the booking is confirmed, the owner cannot change the final price or demand additional amounts not mentioned in the booking details.
legal.section6P3: Booking Respect: Providing the booked unit for the entire agreed-upon stay duration, and not canceling or changing the unit except in extreme cases after notifying the platform and tenant in advance.
legal.section7Intro: The platform aims to build a trusted community based on transparency:
legal.section7P1: Rating Rights: The tenant has the right to rate their experience after the stay period ends, through the star rating and written comments system.
legal.section7P2: Review Integrity: The platform reserves the full right to review and delete any rating proven to be abusive, indecent, intended for defamation, or containing personal contact information.
legal.section7P3: Quality Improvement: These ratings are used as a primary criterion for property ranking and protecting future users from dealing with non-compliant parties.
legal.section8Intro: Makanak operates as a technical platform for connection and mediation. Accordingly:
legal.section8P1: Side Financial Agreements: The platform bears no responsibility for any financial amounts paid or agreed upon outside the "booking deposit" documented through the system.
legal.section8P2: Field Disputes: The platform bears no legal responsibility for material damages, injuries, or disputes that may arise between the owner and tenant after the unit handover and inspection stage.
legal.section8P3: Personal Belongings: The tenant is solely responsible for securing their personal belongings inside the unit. The platform is not obligated to compensate for any loss or theft that may occur during the stay.
legal.section9Intro: To maintain platform security and stability, management reserves the right to suspend or permanently ban any account without prior notice in the following cases:
legal.section9P1: Fraud: Proven fraudulent payment transactions or attempts to hack other accounts.
legal.section9P2: Identity Forgery: Submitting false official documents or personal information during registration.
legal.section9P3: Misuse: Using the platform for illegal purposes or purposes contrary to public morals.
legal.section9P4: System Damage: Repeatedly canceling confirmed bookings without compelling reasons, causing financial harm to other parties and the platform's reputation.
legal.section10Intro: Photos are the fundamental basis for the tenant's decision. Therefore, the owner/host must provide completely honest content:
legal.section10P1: Photo Recency: Photos must be real, recent, and reflect the current condition of the property and its surrounding facilities.
legal.section10P2: Technical Prohibitions: The following are strictly prohibited:
legal.section10P2a: Digital Rendering images or conceptual designs without disclosure.
legal.section10P2b: Photos edited with processing software (e.g., Photoshop) in a way that alters the unit's features or actual size.
legal.section10P2c: Photos impersonating other properties or taken from search engines and the internet.
legal.section11Intro: Makanak reserves the full right to exercise its regulatory role to ensure content quality through:
legal.section11P1: Technical Review: Manual photo inspection or using AI algorithms to detect duplicate or internet-sourced images.
legal.section11P2: Proof Media: Management may request a live explanatory video of the unit or ownership/management documentation before activating the listing.
legal.section11P3: Precautionary Suspension: The platform may temporarily suspend any listing "under review" until its authenticity is verified, and permanently delete it if manipulation is proven.
legal.section12Intro: If deliberate user deception with fake photos is proven, the "black points" system is applied to the account as follows:
legal.section12Strike1P1: An "official warning" is issued via email and within the owner's control panel.
legal.section12Strike1P2: The violating listing is immediately deleted with notification to the owner to correct the content.
legal.section12Strike2P1: Temporary Suspension: All account activities are frozen for 7 business days.
legal.section12Strike2P2: Prohibition from publishing new listings or receiving bookings during the penalty period.
legal.section12Strike3P1: Final Ban: The account is permanently closed and its owner is banned from using the platform in the future.
legal.section12Strike3P2: Blacklist: Identity data and phone number are added to the internal monitoring list to prevent the same person from creating alternative accounts.
legal.section13Intro: If the property is proven not to match the photos displayed on the platform in a way that leads to booking cancellation upon inspection, the following rules apply immediately:
legal.section13P1: Tenant Protection: The full "booking deposit" is refunded to the tenant without any deductions, after verifying the validity of the deception claim.
legal.section13P2: Owner Responsibility: The platform commits to collecting the commission value from the owner (host) as compensation for misusing the platform. The platform may deduct it from any current or future dues.
legal.section13P3: Additional Penalties: The owner is subject to the violations system (Strike System) and the violation may be classified as a "serious violation" leading to immediate ban, depending on the extent of discrepancy between photos and reality.
legal.section14Intro: At Makanak, we place utmost importance on your data privacy and commit to the following standards:
legal.section14P1: Data We Collect: Data collected is limited to (name, phone number, email, and booking details) — only the data necessary to operate the service.
legal.section14P2: Data Protection: We use advanced electronic protection protocols and SSL encryption to ensure no unauthorized party can access user data.
legal.section14P3: No Data Trading: We are fully committed to not selling, renting, or sharing user data with any third party for marketing or other purposes.
legal.section14P4: Conditional Data Sharing: This is our golden rule — contact data between the owner and tenant is only shared after the successful completion of the deposit payment to ensure seriousness and privacy.
